title: Plow Mac App: Run GPT-5.6 on OpenClaw & Hermes safely on your Mac | Product Hunt
excerpt: Plow is a drag-and-drop installer for OpenClaw and Hermes that’s compatible with GPT-5.6-sol. Everything is configured for you: - Integrated with iMessage, right out of the box. - Easily enable Gmail and Slack integrations, and monitor its usage. - Easily share files with your Plow - so Plow can work on your desktop (with your permission)
content_html: Plow is a drag-and-drop installer for OpenClaw and Hermes that’s compatible with GPT-5.6-sol. sentences.zh: Plough 是 OpenClaw 和 Hermes 的拖放安装程序，与 GPT-5.6-sol 兼容。

sentences.en: Everything is configured for you: - Integrated with iMessage, right out of the box. - Easily enable Gmail and Slack integrations, and monitor its usage. - Easily share files with your Plow - so Plow can work on your desktop (with your permission)
sentences.zh: 一切均已为您配置： - 与 iMessage 集成，开箱即用。 - 轻松启用 Gmail 和 Slack 集成，并监控其使用情况。 - 轻松与您的 Plow 共享文件 - 因此 Plow 可以在您的桌面上工作（经过您的许可）

content_html_zh: Plough 是 OpenClaw 和 Hermes 的拖放安装程序，与 GPT-5.6-sol 兼容。 一切均已为您配置： - 与 iMessage 集成，开箱即用。 - 轻松启用 Gmail 和 Slack 集成，并监控其使用情况。 - 轻松与您的 Plow 共享文件 - 因此 Plow 可以在您的桌面上工作（经过您的许可）
